summary_en: 4,343,800 shares (43.42% of shares outstanding) via self-tender offer; price ceiling not yet disclosed; concurrent third-party allotment of treasury shares to Kobebutsusan (TSE Prime listed); Makiri (founder family asset manager, current 43.42% holder) triggered sale intent May 2024; transaction expected to shift control from Makiri to Kobebutsusan; period start June 2026 (planned).
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and public tender offer, disposition of treasury shares by third-party allotment, capital and business alliance with Kobebutsusan, and changes in principal shareholders
translation_en_brief: On 26 May 2026, Makiya's board authorized acquisition of 4,343,800 treasury shares (43.42% of shares outstanding) held by Makiri, a founder-family asset management company and current principal shareholder, via public tender offer. The same board meeting approved concurrent third-party allotment of treasury shares to Kobebutsusan (a TSE Prime-listed company with which Makiya has a franchise agreement for Gyoumu Super stores) and execution of a capital and business alliance agreement with Kobebutsusan. The transaction was triggered when Makiri expressed intention to liquidate its entire 4,343,800-share stake (43.42%) in late May 2024. Management determined that acquiring these shares as treasury stock would improve per-share earnings and return-on-equity metrics. Public tender was selected over open-market or off-auction methods because it provides transparency, equal treatment of shareholders, and allows pricing at a discount to market (which open-market and off-auction methods cannot offer). The company noted that required funding exceeds its March 2026 cash position (3.4 billion yen) and would be financed through a combination of bank borrowing and capital from the third-party allotment. The transaction is expected to result in Kobebutsusan becoming the principal shareholder in place of Makiri. Price ceiling and exact execution timeline to be disclosed in forthcoming tender offer documentation.
